drafting_order: Open with the Ch03 theorem: truth corridors are lawful only when witnesses, admissibility, and replay discipline remain stronger than guesswork.
Draft the Square lens first to state the base entities and invariants needed by `Truth Corridors and Witness Discipline`.
Use the Flower lens second to translate `Truth Corridors and Witness Discipline` into lawful movement, transport, or operator transitions.
Use the Cloud lens third to define truth handling, ambiguity control, and live corridor behavior for `Truth Corridors and Witness Discipline`.
Use the Fractal lens fourth to bind `Truth Corridors and Witness Discipline` to replay, verification, and certificate-bearing return paths.
Integrate strongest external witnesses early: AI DIVINATION, LEGAL TRANSPORT CALCULUS, Constant FInder working.
Use cross-family bridges to connect Ch03 outward: AI DIVINATION <-> DIVINE JUDGMENT - MsDBB1.
There is no existing manuscript draft; the additive handoff should become the first prose-ready scaffold for the final drafter.
Close with a promotion ledger that marks which candidate cells are ready for proof tightening versus immediate drafting.
witness_obligations: All current cells have candidate local witnesses; remaining work is promotion, ordering, and proof tightening.
